spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Sanji might possibly be talking about what Gaban was speaking to him offscreen about.. Either Oda retconned how to beat HK’s or Sanji used conquerors haki offscreen which the crew is una
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Sanji might possibly be talking about what Gaban was speaking to him offscreen about.. Either Oda retconned how to beat HK’s or Sanji used conquerors haki offscreen which the crew is unaware of, leading to them concluding that separating his body parts will hinder regeneration. Just to preface, CONNECTION was NEVER the qualifying factor for regeneration otherwise Sommers would have picked his arm up and reconnected it since it was right there. would make absolutely zero sense for Sanji to say that he “thinks” theres a way to end them if hes referring to just this simple method, nor would he just use the word “ANYWAY” to divert the topic. Why would he divert the topic? unless he was thinking about something that has no relevance to what Jimbei and Co were talking about? those raws are gonna look so crispy ngl.. Pew (@pewpiece) #ONEPIECE1177 More details for onepiece chapter 1177 (From : @Mugiwara_23 ) — https://nitter.net/pewpiece/status/2034335740906074313#m
